recentTweets.text: We need to get back to America being a place of big ideas and big investments. https://t.co/EBVnby03nX

I was targeted by the Biden DOJ’s Arctic Frost operation. This behavior showed an unprecedented level of disregard for the rule of law and the constitutional separation of powers. I’m grateful to the whistleblowers who brought these acts to light and to the Senate Judiciary

I’m again urging the United States Postal Service to prioritize improving mail service in South Dakota. I’m encouraged by the progress and investments made so far, and I hope these efforts continue to ensure South Dakotans receive the reliable mail service they deserve.
RT @PatrickMcHenry: For over two decades in Congress, I saw how bold, forward-looking legislation can move our country ahead, and how outda…
RT @the535news: “There are still some things that we have got to do together as a country. Transportation infrastructure should be one of t…

Biofuels represent a uniquely powerful tool to sustain investment in America’s capacity to feed and fuel the world. The opportunity is real. The time to act is now.
https://t.co/QGgPX8rZpi
Happy 250th Birthday, America! Grateful for our freedoms, proud of our flag, and committed to building a more perfect union. Let the celebrations shine bright! #America250 https://t.co/RwMfMSrcGu

The Supreme Court just affirmed that states have the right to protect women’s sports. Fairness for women and girls wins. 
https://t.co/61KFIDU0KL

The South Dakota winner of the Congressional Art Competition, Cadence Micucci of Tea, visited D.C. this week to see her artwork displayed in the Capitol. It was a pleasure speaking with her about the piece and how proudly it represents our state. https://t.co/oxjxfg4bda
I caught up with a group of Webster Bearcats at the Capitol today. Washington, D.C. is an incredible place to be as we look ahead to America 250. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/jpZfESyzOt
As a father to three boys, I know there’s no greater blessing or responsibility. Happy Father’s Day to all the dads and father figures out there. https://t.co/sStMlTYHq0

Sioux Falls has made tremendous improvements to its Sioux Area Metro services in recent years. I joined Mayor Paul TenHaken and Via Transportation to see firsthand how Sioux Falls has become a national leader in public transit. https://t.co/rpGczRlHRr
It was great to join the conversation about the future of digital assets, and my work set guardrails for the crypto industry through the CLARITY Act. Thanks for having me!
Proud of the history, sacrifice, and unity this flag represents. #FlagDay https://t.co/jIeXWWY1AB

Taxpayer dollars should support the people who truly need them. Sending federal funds to fraudsters is a serious failure, which is why I voted for more oversight into where these dollars are going. https://t.co/giNLW2nykI
I caught up with students from Platte‑Geddes outside the Capitol this week. It was great to chat with them and answer a few questions about what’s happening in Congress. https://t.co/gFlIZ3HFsm

The federal government loses an estimated $233 billion to $521 billion to fraud every year. This is unacceptable. I voted to pass several common-sense bills to stop fraud in government programs because every taxpayer dollar matters.
I found some Bulldogs in the Capitol today! Madison Middle School’s 8th graders are in D.C. this week. I had a great time chatting with them during their visit. https://t.co/NiYRjxySeI

Congratulations to Mark Cruz on his nomination for Director of the Indian Health Service. Mark has strong ties to South Dakota’s tribal leaders and volunteered with Teach for America at Rosebud. He will lead IHS well and improve health care for Native communities across South

I spoke to Girls State attendees in Vermillion about the importance of civic engagement at all levels of government. They had some great questions about leadership, supporting South Dakota ag, and the future impact of artificial intelligence. I’m looking forward to seeing how https://t.co/PXYGQiRmN7

LiDAR may not be a household name, but the technology provides millimeter‑level data of America’s infrastructure. We cannot rely on Chinese LiDAR systems to examine our roads, and I’m glad my bill to protect America from this spy technology is included in @TransportGOP’s BUILD https://t.co/FmlULV8AUn

The students at Boys State in Aberdeen are a fun and thoughtful group. It was great to talk with them about Congress and the role of the federal government. I know their work will improve South Dakota and America over the next 20 years and beyond. https://t.co/Xtqp6IPQpd
This #MemorialDay we honor the brave men and women who gave everything for our freedom. Their sacrifice will never be forgotten. I’m grateful today and every day. https://t.co/Sb5k1DANcp

🚨 PASSED out of @TransportGOP – the BUILD America 250 Act provides a historic investment in our transportation infrastructure to repair roads and bridges, improve our supply chain, and strengthen our national security.

China has built a multi‑billion‑dollar industry by selling illegal, dangerous vapes to our kids. China must stop evading our trade laws and stop sending these vapes into our country.
https://t.co/fNh6uRDuHo
I enjoyed seeing my fellow Yotes in D.C. this week! We talked about their future plans and I gave them an exclusive tour of the Capitol. https://t.co/Pu5mPXbGfp

America’s infrastructure is lagging behind China’s. Our roads are filled with potholes and many of our bridges need rebuilt. D.C. bureaucrats must reject political and climate agendas and let the free market work to revitalize our highways and our supply chain.

The proof is in the pudding—Chinese companies have been colluding and manipulating the global shipping markets for years, DOUBLING costs for U.S. shippers and increasing consumer prices. This is wholly unacceptable. 

That’s why we need my bill to reauthorize the FMC signed into

HEROES. I had the privilege of thanking veterans for their service at Arlington National Cemetery. The Midwest Honor Flight is a remarkable program, and I’m grateful to have shared in their experience. https://t.co/mVt0B5kNcz

I talked with employees of American Bank & Trust about the impact year-round E15 would have for South Dakota, my work to improve the Postal Service, the Farm Bill, and the importance of economic growth. Thanks for having me! https://t.co/tPdgVzO9S9

It’s National Emergency Medical Services Week, a great time to show thanks to those who show up and save lives. I’ve done a shift in the Rapid City Emergency Department and saw first-hand how dedicated EMS workers are to protecting their communities. https://t.co/JOam2QWtJm

Truckers drive our economy and keep goods moving. I joined the South Dakota Trucking Association’s Truck Driving Competition Banquet to thank them for their hard work and share what I’m doing to support their efforts. https://t.co/oLtowc7tzs
Iran can’t be allowed to control the Strait of Hormuz and global trade. President Trump and our allies understand this and I’m hopeful cooler heads will prevail. https://t.co/ZwDVDyqYf2

Volunteer firefighters and EMS workers provide essential services to South Dakota communities. It was great to catch up with the SD Firefighters Association this week to discuss our efforts to secure resources for volunteer fire departments in the House-passed Farm Bill. https://t.co/97NXzqAedm
Some of these awards can be a little corny, but this one means a great deal. 🌽⛽️ https://t.co/WUeysQAHC0

RT @BlakeTroli: "We cannot complete divorce ourselves from China,  but we do need to strategically de-risk," 

Rep. Dusty Johnson on China…

🚨 I just voted to pass year-round E15, giving drivers a cheaper option at the pump and supporting our farmers. We need more American-made fuel, and E15 will help drive down gas prices across the country. I’m proud of our work to get this bill passed and hope it gets signed into

Drivers should have the option to fill their gas tank with E15 in every state, in every season. This option will save them money and support American agriculture. It’s time to get this done. https://t.co/oNhQkiK0Iq

In 2022, an illegal immigrant was driving through South Dakota with enough Chinese fentanyl to kill 500,000 people. Thanks to the hard work of our law enforcement officers, these drugs were not consumed by any of our loved ones. I’ve worked with President Trump to secure the

I checked out Thermo Bond Buildings in Brandon, which creates modular buildings for a variety of customer needs from cellular communications to oil and gas production and more to protect valuable equipment from weather. This impressive facility is full of American innovation. https://t.co/iMtPflrIH3
Working in law enforcement is a public service like no other. I’m grateful to those who step up to protect their community. #NationalPoliceWeek https://t.co/CempVNbvuD

Women should not be coerced into taking mifepristone. I hope the Supreme Court reverses this dangerous Biden-era policy. I’m proud to join more than 100 lawmakers to protect the lives of the unborn.
https://t.co/CdPhPkeHIZ
Wishing a Happy Mother’s Day to all the incredible moms who can do it all. Especially, my wife and mother to our three boys, Jacquelyn! https://t.co/lVFEqxR1SY

I haven’t bought or sold any individual stocks during my time in Congress. I’m leading legislation to prohibit members of Congress from trading individual stocks because serving in Congress is a public service, not a chance to strike it rich.
https://t.co/h4Dy4KMgrl
Whole Milk = Healthy Kids. 🥛🐄
RT @FRCdc: @tperkins @LeaderJohnThune @BillCassidy @SpeakerJohnson Thank you, @RepDustyJohnson, for standing for the safety of women and ch…

Working Against Violence, Inc. is one of the largest victim service providers in the state. I toured their facility in Rapid City and talked with WAVI leaders about the important work they are doing in western South Dakota. https://t.co/phmLy2tC35

The Sanford Underground Research Facility is doing incredible research about the earth. I joined a beam signing ceremony alongside Energy Undersecretary Dr. Darío Gil to celebrate the continued construction of this facility. https://t.co/Q3GcSqVKvu
Small businesses are the heartbeat of our communities. I’m proud to support them this week and always. Happy Small Business Week! https://t.co/G8bxn93XrK

China shouldn’t be able to buy farmland or land near military bases. I’m leading legislation to stop these purchases and to give federal authorities more oversight into foreign land transactions.
https://t.co/bL0ekIoBRD

Congrats to Cadence Micucci from Tea for being selected as the winner of the Congressional Art Competition! Cadence’s artwork will be proudly displayed in the halls of Congress. https://t.co/enPMcLiqdi

🚨 President Trump signed my Tribal Trust Land Homeownership Act into law! This bill improves access to home ownership on tribal lands by cutting through government bureaucracy. Thanks @LeaderJohnThune and @SenatorRounds for your work on this.
I’m thankful to the nurses across South Dakota for their hard work and dedication. Wishing all nurses a happy National Nurses Day! https://t.co/O2qx5owTX6

The South Dakota National Guard broke ground today on a new vehicle maintenance shop in Watertown. This new facility received $28 million from the 2026 national defense funding bill that I voted to pass. https://t.co/cKsk33NRW4

🚨 Applications to be nominated to a U.S. Service Academy are open now! Interested students should click here to learn more ⬇️🇺🇸 
https://t.co/NHm8VjO1Sv
May 5 is the National Day of Awareness for Missing and Murdered Indigenous Women and Girls. Their stories matter. Their voices matter.  #MMIWG

The Public Safety Building in Lake Norden is a testament to the strength of our South Dakota communities. It was great to tour the facility and talk with community leaders about the importance of public safety. https://t.co/Q584BC8OMI

I kicked off Teacher Appreciation Week with a visit to De Smet to chat with middle and high school students and tour the new elementary addition. Thanks for having me, Bulldogs! https://t.co/AK2iAfnsA2

I’m glad @TheJusticeDept is exercising oversight of the big four meat packers. We must increase processing capacity outside of the big four.

I’m leading a bill that does that — it’s currently being implemented by @USDA as a pilot program. It’s time to make it permanent.

Welcome home, 114th Fighter Wing! These airmen served a four-month deployment in support of the U.S. Northern Command’s National Special Security Event mission. I’m thankful for their service and sacrifice to keep Americans safe. https://t.co/4HT8q3NRy9

kurdistanMentions.text: I checked out Thermo Bond Buildings in Brandon, which creates modular buildings for a variety of customer needs from cellular communications to oil and gas production and more to protect valuable equipment from weather. This impressive facility is full of American innovation. https://t.co/iMtPflrIH3

The Sanford Underground Research Facility is doing incredible research about the earth. I joined a beam signing ceremony alongside Energy Undersecretary Dr. Darío Gil to celebrate the continued construction of this facility. https://t.co/Q3GcSqVKvu
I talked with Growth Energy about the need for permanent year-round E15 and the positive impact ethanol has on South Dakota’s economy. It’s time to get it done. https://t.co/PR3qRHRVgL
I spoke with employees at Black Hills Energy in Rapid City about the importance of a reliable energy supply and my work in Congress to unleash American energy production. https://t.co/vnig95GnAd

Getting the Farm Bill signed into law, increasing fertilizer price transparency, and securing year-round sales of E15 are critical steps Congress must take to support our producers. 

I spoke to reporters with the National Association of Farm Broadcasting to share more about my https://t.co/yNpmiLSVDR
Damien is South Dakota’s Poetry Out Loud champion and was in D.C. competing at the national level. Congratulations on earning 2nd place at the national competition! https://t.co/NKuyabG45s

🚨 FARM BILL PASSES HOUSE 
 
This Farm Bill puts producers FIRST:
- Protects American ag exports
- ENDS California’s Prop 12 mandates
- Enhances conservation programs
- Improves rural broadband https://t.co/UFUoFqXk2d

Water is critically important to the future success of eastern South Dakota as this region continues to grow. I’m working to secure safe and ample water resources for generations to come. https://t.co/3zpxcr69hm

Broadband access connects communities and supports the economy. I met with South Dakota Telecommunications Association leaders to discuss the important work they are doing to deploy rural broadband. https://t.co/R2OL2gAgTh

I’m thankful President Trump and those at the Correspondents’ Dinner are safe. Secret Service and law enforcement officers did a great job acting quickly to keep everyone safe. I’m praying for the Secret Service agent who was shot and for America. 

Violence is not the answer.

Big day in Flandreau! The Boys & Girls Club just opened the Early Childhood Enrichment Center. Childcare is vital for many families, and this new facility will make a real difference for the community. https://t.co/mHM3X56yDc

Thanks @AmericanAgNet for having me on to talk about my work on the Farm Bill, E15, and fertilizer price transparency. Hear more ⬇️

https://t.co/LSOz83TZ09
It was great to talk with parents and Head Start leadership from Pierre about the impact their program can have on communities. https://t.co/3ET8sjPkeC
The South Dakota Cattlemen’s Association stopped by to talk about our shared support for the Farm Bill, strong trade agreements, and the importance of conservation programs. https://t.co/oxxyBnNvJk

I spoke with members of the Siouxland Chamber about ways we can work together to support southeastern South Dakota. We discussed our work to improve flood protection, workforce challenges, the Farm Bill, healthcare, and wastewater infrastructure. https://t.co/84bPfPBejz
My Fertilizer Transparency Act would give producers information they need to make better decisions. Hear more ⬇️ https://t.co/qVNFZBkuek

South Dakota Beer Distributors are in DC this week to talk about their legislative priorities. They’re glad that the Working Families Tax Cuts, which I voted for, included a provision to permanently decrease taxes for beer distributorships, most of which are family owned. https://t.co/2R9MMOnS8m
America has so many built-in advantages for AI development compared to China. If we CHOOSE to win the AI battle against China – we WILL win. https://t.co/43UoHH6pUC

I testified in support of my bill to conduct a feasibility study for the Western Dakota Regional Water project in West River. It’s hard to overstate the importance of water and I’m proud to support this important step forward. https://t.co/3YOBnMg9kX

It was great to catch up with the SD Pork Producers. We discussed efforts to end California’s Proposition 12, which was included in the Farm Bill that recently passed the House Agriculture Committee. https://t.co/O26ZMmlTCT

Shutdowns are always stupid. Republicans have a straightforward plan to reopen DHS. Members of Congress shouldn’t get paid during a shutdown – I’m not receiving my paycheck – but government employees should. I’m leading legislation that would do both. https://t.co/b6dtkNJRMw

I agree @SecRollins. China should NOT be allowed to buy American farmland. 
https://t.co/3GtndaFfQH
RT @HouseAgGOP: At today's CFTC hearing with @ChairmanSelig, getting the CLARITY Act across the finish line remains top of mind. It's time…
I talked with Growth Energy about the need for permanent year-round E15 and the positive impact ethanol has on South Dakota’s economy. It’s time to get it done. https://t.co/PR3qRHRVgL
Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon. https://t.co/DcdCxBp03p
